title: Bitter Gooey Mexican Mars Bar Taco
description: A sweet and savory taco that blends smoky beef, luscious melted Mars chocolate, and a touch of guava jam for a romantic, bittersweet bite.

ingredients.name: Mars bars
ingredients.notes: cut into small pieces for melting

instructions: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and warm each tortilla for about 30 seconds per side until pliable.

Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in the same skillet over medium‑high heat. Add the ground beef, cumin, smoked paprika, taco seasoning, and pinch of salt. Cook, breaking the meat apart, until browned and the internal temperature reaches 70 °C (about 7–8 minutes). Remove from heat and set aside.
Cut the Mars bars into small pieces and place them in a heat‑proof bowl. Melt on low heat or microwave 20–30 seconds until gooey.

To assemble, spread a thin layer of guava jam on each warm tortilla. Top with a portion of the seasoned beef, sprinkle with shredded cheese, and drizzle with the molten Mars chocolate. Finish with a handful of chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
Fold the tacos and serve immediately for the best gooey texture.
